creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 188431
screenshot

Today, I have upgraded my server to new 11-STABLE. Before it ran fine 11-STABLE from 24.10.2017. There's a problem with a serial connection from my BMC. You can have a look at the attached screenshot. Entering commands is completely blind now, and the output is severely crippled. This is visible right from the bootloader.

My hardware is ASUS KGPE-D16 board with coreboot 4.6 and OpenBMC port.
